New Client Exclusive

Your First Laser Session — Just $149

Experience the Lumenis Splendor X difference with our introductory laser hair removal package. Choose any combination of three popular areas and discover why our clients never go back to waxing.

Powered by Lumenis Splendor X

Choose Any 3 Areas

Mix and match from our most popular treatment zones

Bikini Line
Underarms
Half Legs
  • BLEND X™ dual-wavelength technology
  • Safe for ALL skin types (Fitzpatrick I–VI)
  • Virtually painless with dual cooling system
  • Fastest treatment times in the industry

Regular value $350+

Your introductory session includes:

  • Free skin consultation
  • Customized treatment settings
  • Post-treatment care kit

Our Treatments

Premium Services

Advanced aesthetic treatments tailored to your unique needs, delivered with expertise and the latest technology.

Laser Hair Removal

Permanent hair reduction with the Splendor X — fast, comfortable, and effective for all skin types.

IPL Stellar M22

The gold standard in IPL technology — target sun damage, redness, vascular lesions, and uneven skin tone with the Lumenis Stellar M22.

ResurFX

Non-ablative fractional laser for skin resurfacing, scars, stretch marks, and texture improvement.

Where Science
Meets Beauty

Botox

Smooth fine lines and wrinkles with precision injections for a refreshed, natural appearance.

Dermal Fillers

Restore volume, enhance contours, and rejuvenate your look with premium hyaluronic acid fillers.

PRP Therapy

Harness your body's natural healing power for skin rejuvenation, hair restoration, and collagen boost.

#1

Laser Platform
Worldwide

Why Kami

Why Choose
Kami Aesthetics

We invest in the best technology and talent so you get the best results — period.

Splendor X Technology

The world's first BLEND X™ technology combining Alexandrite and Nd:YAG lasers for superior results on all skin types — faster, safer, and more comfortable.

Premium Results

We don't cut corners. Every treatment is performed with medical-grade precision to deliver visible, lasting results you can trust.

Safety & Expertise

Our licensed professionals undergo rigorous training on the latest protocols. Your safety and comfort are our top priorities.

Personalized Care

Every client receives a customized treatment plan designed around their unique skin type, goals, and lifestyle.

Real Results

Before & After

See the transformative results our clients experience with our premium treatments.

Client Love

What Our Clients Say

“I've been to multiple med spas in Miami, and Kami Aesthetics is in a completely different league. The Splendor X laser was virtually painless and the results after just 3 sessions are incredible.”

Maria S.

Laser Hair Removal

M

“The level of professionalism and care here is outstanding. They took the time to explain everything and create a personalized plan. My skin has never looked better after the IPL treatments.”

A
